function.message: I found the day-job exception project start date: Dockflow Exception Radar started on 2026-04-18. I could not verify whether the sailboat refit notebook started earlier because I found no matching canonical project record in 40_projects, so I did not delete anything.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, treated the inbox file as a request rather than canonical truth, and used the canonical project README plus project-folder date prefix in 40_projects. Because the referenced sailboat refit notebook could not be found in the canonical project lane after additional searches, I stopped without mutating the workspace.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the inbox request depends on a second project ('sailboat refit notebook') that is missing from the available canonical evidence in 40_projects. I verified the day-job exception project via 40_projects/2026_04_18_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD, but without a canonical record for the other project I cannot safely compare start dates or determine the correct deletion target without guessing.
